query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `paperPenaltyBox` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `ticker` varchar(16) NOT NULL,
  `activatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `expiresAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `slHitCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 2,
  `sessionId` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  CONSTRAINT `paperPenaltyBox_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  INDEX `paperPenaltyBox_userId_ticker_idx` (`userId`, `ticker`),
  INDEX `paperPenaltyBox_expiresAt_idx` (`expiresAt`)
);
